Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows mildly low blood glucose and globulin, elevated creatinine suggesting possible renal impairment, and high triglycerides and HDL cholesterol. Other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation for renal function and metabolic status, and consider further evaluation of kidney function and lipid management as appropriate.
